name: Evolutionary Records
description: Notes The Evolutionary Records is a unique tome with three modes that change the Priest’s stats and add additional shots to boost DPS.
effects: Hold [Shift] for 3 seconds to change modes Sea Evolution: Turn into a powerful crustacean for 6 seconds. Transformation Perks: Gain two additional projectiles on shoot which deal 80-110 damage. Effect on Self: WIS Boost (+15 WIS), VIT Boost (+15 VIT), SPD Decrease (-10 SPD), DEX Decrease (-10 DEX) for 6 seconds. Heal: 90 (+0.715 per VIT over 35) HP Self Effect: Healing [45/s] (+0.3575 per VIT over 35) for 6 seconds Land Evolution: Turn into a powerful reptile for 6 seconds. Transformation Perks: Gain two additional projectiles on shoot which deal 90-110 damage. Effect on Self: ATT Boost (+15 ATT), DEF Boost (+15 DEF), WIS Decrease (-10 WIS), HP Decrease (-100 HP) for 6 seconds. Heal: 90 (+0.715 per DEF over 35) HP Self Effect: Healing [45/s] (+0.3575 per DEF over 35) for 6 seconds Sky Evolution: Turn into a powerful insect for 6 seconds. Transformation Perks: Gain two additional projectiles on shoot which deal 40-60 armour piercing damage. Effect on Self: DEX Boost (+15 DEX), SPD Boost (+15 SPD), VIT Decrease (-10 VIT), DEF Decrease (-10 DEF) for 6 seconds. Heal: 90 (+0.715 per SPD over 50) HP Self Effect: Healing [45/s] (+0.3575 per SPD over 50) for 6 seconds
